stemHtml: An EU operator, seeking approval for the purpose of transporting passengers, cargo, and mail for remuneration, who additionally intends to carry Dangerous Goods, must comply with the requirements of…

options.a: Annex III (Part-ORO), Annex IV (Part-CAT), and relevant provisions of Annex IX (Part-DG) of Commission Regulation (EU) No 965/2012.
options.b: Annex I (Part-FCL), Annex VII (Part-ORO), and relevant provisions of Annex V (Part-CC) of Commission Regulation (EU) No 1178/2011.
options.c: Annex III (Part-ORO), Annex IV (Part-CAT), and relevant provisions of Annex V (Part-SPA) of Commission Regulation (EU) No 965/2012.
options.d: Annex I (Part-FCL), Annex VII (Part-ORO), and relevant provisions of Annex IV (Part-MED) of Commission Regulation (EU) No 1178/2011.
